emails.subject: Access to west power
emails.body: Access to west power I currently trade on the west desk gas desk and would like to get access to the westpower.enron.com website. Phillip Allen thought that maybe you could help me. Please advise. Thank you.

emails.subject: Re: Access to west power
emails.body: Re: Access to west power Jane, you need to submit a request via the eRequest system. (itcentral.enron.com) Search for west power under "applications" and select general access, just note that you're in west gas. That should do it. Cooper Jane M Tholt 01/03/2001 12:35 PM
